# USBInterfaceGetStringIndex

**Instance Property**

Returns the string index in the interface descriptor.

## Declaration

```swift
IOReturn (*USBInterfaceGetStringIndex)(void *self, UInt8 *si);
```

## Discussion

The interface does not have to be open to use this function.
